message: Selling a Casio digital watch - water resistant with a new battery. Great condition. Asking $35.

Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a wonderful day so far. I'm clearing out some space and have a beautiful vintage Pentax K1000 film camera for sale. It's in full working condition and takes great photos! I'm asking $65 for it. Let me know if you're interested!
Looking for a kitchen blender for smoothies and sturdy boots (size 10 or 11). Let me know what you have!
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads. $90.
Still interested in a blender and boots if anyone has them.

Watching the market. Still looking for those boots and blender.
